query:
SELECT DISTINCT de.indication, COUNT(DISTINCT de.id) as medication_count
FROM drug_entries de
WHERE de.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND de.indication != ''
  AND de.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT drug_entry_id FROM drug_entry_codes)
GROUP BY de.indication
ORDER BY medication_count DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT DISTINCT de.indication, COUNT(DISTINCT de.id) as medication_count
FROM drug_entries de
WHERE de.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND de.indication != ''
  AND de.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT drug_entry_id FROM drug_entry_codes)
GROUP BY de.indication
ORDER BY medication_count DESC
